name: Tuna Steak Marinade - Bsnx01a
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all marinade ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place tuna steaks in the marinade, ensuring they are well coated.
3. Allow the fish to marinate for at least 30 minutes, or up to an hour for more flavor.
4. Preheat grill or broiler.
5. Cook the marinated tuna steaks on the grill, basting with remaining marinade, for 4-6 minutes on each side, or until the fish flakes easily when tested with a fork.
6. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
Meal Mastered by Stuart Talkofsky from a bag of tuna steaks.
